markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on pre-holiday client strategy and process improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/TrMzVHgxWdxHedhMUStEHyCYTQYR-Rjo?tab=summary&timestamp=58.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Unblock Publishing:** Bailey will demand feedback on 13+ stalled articles in tomorrow's sync, making it a prerequisite for any new publishing schedule.](https://fathom.video/share/TrMzVHgxWdxHedhMUStEHyCYTQYR-Rjo?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
  - [**Streamline Workflow:** The pre-approval draft step will be eliminated to improve efficiency and align with Panzer's directive to reduce Claude post-processing.](https://fathom.video/share/TrMzVHgxWdxHedhMUStEHyCYTQYR-Rjo?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
  - [**Propose New Content:** Bailey will pitch adding FAQs with schema and using infographics (from the Abnormal client workflow) to replace disliked stock photos.](https://fathom.video/share/TrMzVHgxWdxHedhMUStEHyCYTQYR-Rjo?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)
  - [**Gather Strategic Inputs:** Bailey will request Atul's list of sales-driven topics and ask for client feedback on the new vetted stats database to improve content accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/TrMzVHgxWdxHedhMUStEHyCYTQYR-Rjo?tab=summary&timestamp=1283.0)

## Topics

### Client Blockers & Process Friction

  - [**Publishing Bottleneck:** 13+ articles are stalled in client review, blocking the desired daily publishing cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/TrMzVHgxWdxHedhMUStEHyCYTQYR-Rjo?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
      - [**Action:** Bailey will demand feedback in tomorrow's sync, making it a prerequisite for any new schedule.](https://fathom.video/share/TrMzVHgxWdxHedhMUStEHyCYTQYR-Rjo?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)
  - [**Comparison Articles:** Requires client-side product positioning docs and battle cards to be effective.](https://fathom.video/share/TrMzVHgxWdxHedhMUStEHyCYTQYR-Rjo?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)
      - [**Action:** Bailey will request these docs and a list of top objections to build stronger arguments.](https://fathom.video/share/TrMzVHgxWdxHedhMUStEHyCYTQYR-Rjo?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)
      - [**Plan:** Mariana will produce one comparison article per week, mixed with other topics, to avoid a shallow focus.](https://fathom.video/share/TrMzVHgxWdxHedhMUStEHyCYTQYR-Rjo?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)

### Workflow & Tooling Improvements

  - [**Eliminate Pre-Approval Drafts:** The draft step will be removed from the workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/TrMzVHgxWdxHedhMUStEHyCYTQYR-Rjo?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The draft step is inefficient and doesn't guarantee the final article will match, forcing time-consuming manual edits outside of Atlas.](https://fathom.video/share/TrMzVHgxWdxHedhMUStEHyCYTQYR-Rjo?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
      - [**Positioning:** Frame the change as a system update driven by the new agentic process, which renders the old draft step unnecessary.](https://fathom.video/share/TrMzVHgxWdxHedhMUStEHyCYTQYR-Rjo?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)
  - [**Reduce Claude Post-Processing:** Panzer's directive to minimize Claude use for post-processing is a key driver for improving the core Atlas workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/TrMzVHgxWdxHedhMUStEHyCYTQYR-Rjo?tab=summary&timestamp=681.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Manual fixes in Atlas are time-consuming (\~2 hours per article), making it critical to get the initial output right.](https://fathom.video/share/TrMzVHgxWdxHedhMUStEHyCYTQYR-Rjo?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
      - [**Example:** Atlas's SEO step ignores manually added secondary keywords (e.g., "contextual intelligence"), requiring manual insertion.](https://fathom.video/share/TrMzVHgxWdxHedhMUStEHyCYTQYR-Rjo?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)

### New Content & SEO Opportunities

  - [**Add FAQs with Schema:** A new content feature to improve SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/TrMzVHgxWdxHedhMUStEHyCYTQYR-Rjo?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)
      - [**Implementation:** Bailey will propose this in the sync; the team can add the necessary schema to the Webflow blog template.](https://fathom.video/share/TrMzVHgxWdxHedhMUStEHyCYTQYR-Rjo?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)
      - [**Strategy:** Each FAQ section will include two top-of-funnel questions and one solution-specific question.](https://fathom.video/share/TrMzVHgxWdxHedhMUStEHyCYTQYR-Rjo?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)
  - [**Propose Infographics:** A new visual style to replace disliked stock photos.](https://fathom.video/share/TrMzVHgxWdxHedhMUStEHyCYTQYR-Rjo?tab=summary&timestamp=832.0)
      - [**Source:** The workflow is proven with the Abnormal client.](https://fathom.video/share/TrMzVHgxWdxHedhMUStEHyCYTQYR-Rjo?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)
      - [**Requirements:** Only client brand colors are needed.](https://fathom.video/share/TrMzVHgxWdxHedhMUStEHyCYTQYR-Rjo?tab=summary&timestamp=1049.0)
      - [**Benefit:** Infographics can be optimized with descriptive alt attributes generated by Gemini.](https://fathom.video/share/TrMzVHgxWdxHedhMUStEHyCYTQYR-Rjo?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)

### Content Strategy & Inputs

  - [**Vetted Stats Database:** Mariana is building a database of vetted stats (e.g., from FBI, CISA) to improve content accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/TrMzVHgxWdxHedhMUStEHyCYTQYR-Rjo?tab=summary&timestamp=1283.0)
      - [**Action:** Bailey will share this initiative with the client and ask for their preferred/disliked sources.](https://fathom.video/share/TrMzVHgxWdxHedhMUStEHyCYTQYR-Rjo?tab=summary&timestamp=1283.0)
  - [**Sales-Driven Topics:** Atul has offered to provide a list of topics needed for the sales journey.](https://fathom.video/share/TrMzVHgxWdxHedhMUStEHyCYTQYR-Rjo?tab=summary&timestamp=1390.0)
      - [**Action:** Bailey will follow up with Atul to get this list, which can inform keyword research.](https://fathom.video/share/TrMzVHgxWdxHedhMUStEHyCYTQYR-Rjo?tab=summary&timestamp=1390.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Bailey:**](https://fathom.video/share/TrMzVHgxWdxHedhMUStEHyCYTQYR-Rjo?tab=summary&timestamp=58.0)
      - [Demand feedback on stalled articles in tomorrow's sync.](https://fathom.video/share/TrMzVHgxWdxHedhMUStEHyCYTQYR-Rjo?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
      - [Request product positioning docs, battle cards, and top objections.](https://fathom.video/share/TrMzVHgxWdxHedhMUStEHyCYTQYR-Rjo?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)
      - [Propose adding FAQs with schema and using infographics.](https://fathom.video/share/TrMzVHgxWdxHedhMUStEHyCYTQYR-Rjo?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)
      - [Ask Atul for his list of sales-driven topics.](https://fathom.video/share/TrMzVHgxWdxHedhMUStEHyCYTQYR-Rjo?tab=summary&timestamp=1390.0)
      - [Share the vetted stats database and ask for client feedback on sources.](https://fathom.video/share/TrMzVHgxWdxHedhMUStEHyCYTQYR-Rjo?tab=summary&timestamp=1283.0)
      - [Send the holiday out-of-office plan to Mariana for review by EOD tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/TrMzVHgxWdxHedhMUStEHyCYTQYR-Rjo?tab=summary&timestamp=1228.0)
  - [**Mariana:**](https://fathom.video/share/TrMzVHgxWdxHedhMUStEHyCYTQYR-Rjo?tab=summary&timestamp=1228.0)
      - [Review Bailey's holiday out-of-office plan.](https://fathom.video/share/TrMzVHgxWdxHedhMUStEHyCYTQYR-Rjo?tab=summary&timestamp=1228.0)
      - [Continue producing one comparison article per week, mixed with other topics.](https://fathom.video/share/TrMzVHgxWdxHedhMUStEHyCYTQYR-Rjo?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
